full_text:
Cui Jun (Yuanping) 崔均 (元平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Jun (崔均), styledYuanping (元平), was born in Boling. Accompanied his father, wanted to avenge him but died of illness. Cui Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Cui Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
